sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Truist Financial Corp Buys 168,439 Shares of Medtronic PLC $MDT
feed.summary: Truist Financial Corp recently increased its stake in Medtronic PLC by 7.5% during the third quarter, purchasing an additional 168,439 shares. Following this transaction, Truist Financial Corp now holds 2,409,915 shares of Medtronic, valued at approximately $229.52 million. Other institutional investors like Vanguard Group Inc. and Arrowstreet Capital Limited Partnership have also adjusted their holdings in the medical technology company.

feed.title: Chevron Adds GIP's Thomas Horton to Board
feed.summary: Chevron has appointed Thomas Horton, a partner at Global Infrastructure Partners (GIP) of BlackRock, as an independent director, increasing its board to 13 members. Horton, 64, will also join Chevron's Board Audit Committee and brings extensive experience from senior roles at American Airlines Group Inc. and board positions at companies like Walmart and General Electric. This appointment comes as current Chair and CEO Mike Wirth discusses his potential retirement in the future.

feed.title: Buy Walmart and 3 Retail Stocks Even as Consumer Confidence Dips
feed.summary: Despite a significant dip in U.S. consumer confidence to a decade low, the article recommends investing in certain retail stocks. It highlights Dollar General, Walmart, Dollar Tree, and TJX Companies as well-positioned to thrive in a cautious consumer environment due to their value propositions, scale, and strategic initiatives. The piece emphasizes that these retailers can capture market share as households prioritize essentials and seek greater value.

feed.title: Truist Financial Corp Sells 20,795 Shares of Lowe's Companies, Inc. $LOW
feed.summary: Truist Financial Corp decreased its stake in Lowe's Companies, Inc. by 4.0% in the third quarter, selling 20,795 shares and retaining 505,033 shares valued at $126.92 million. This comes as Lowe's CEO Marvin R. Ellison also sold 18,000 shares for roughly $4.70 million. Lowe's reported strong Q3 earnings, beating EPS estimates, and declared a $1.20 quarterly dividend, while analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $283.65.

feed.title: NYSE Content Advisory: Pre-Market Update + First Lady Melania Trump to Ring NYSE Bell for Doc 'Melania'
feed.summary: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) released a pre-market update announcing U.S. equities are higher, with tech leading, and the S&P 500 nearing 7,000 ahead of the Fed's rate decision. First Lady Melania Trump is scheduled to ring the Opening Bell for the Amazon MGM Studios film "Melania." Additionally, Cellares announced a $257M Series D round led by BlackRock.

feed.title: CoStar Group Reiterates Strategic Initiatives to Prioritize Profitable Growth and Increase Long-term Stockholder Value
feed.summary: CoStar Group (NASDAQ: CSGP) has reaffirmed its strategic initiatives aimed at prioritizing profitable growth and increasing long-term stockholder value, responding to a letter from Third Point LLC. The company highlighted actions taken over the past nine months, including board appointments, formation of a Capital Allocation Committee, moderation of Homes.com investment, and a new share repurchase program. CoStar Group emphasized its confidence in the Homes.com platform's growth and its broader strategy for value creation, expecting significant revenue and Adjusted EBITDA increases by 2026 and robust long-term profitability.

feed.title: How to keep your pipes from freezing in this deep Pennsylvania cold
feed.summary: Pennsylvania American Water is urging customers to take preventative measures against frozen pipes as sub-zero temperatures hit the state. The company advises homeowners to know their main shut-off valve location, insulate exposed pipes, drain irrigation systems, and understand safe thawing methods. They also remind customers that internal plumbing is the homeowner's responsibility and provide resources for lead service line identification.

feed.title: AbbVie Partners with Trump Administration to Enhance Access and Affordability
feed.summary: AbbVie announced a voluntary agreement with the Trump administration, pledging $100 billion over the next decade for U.S.-based R&D and capital investments to improve healthcare access and affordability. The company also committed to offering low prices in Medicaid to enhance patient access to medications. The article includes analyst ratings and price targets for ABBV, highlighting a "Moderate Buy" consensus despite a recent downgrade from Citi.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley on Progressive Corp. (PGR): 'continued progress in growth and margin would help us to become incrementally positive'
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley analyst Bob Huang reiterated an Underweight rating and $214.00 price target on Progressive Corp. The analyst notes that despite fears of competition and seasonality, the company saw strong auto PIF growth and solid underwriting. While remaining Underweight for now, the analyst stated that continued progress in growth and margin could lead to a more positive outlook.

feed.title: National Geographic Society and EPAM Partner to Inspire the Next Generation of Changemakers with Advanced Technology
feed.summary: The National Geographic Society and EPAM have announced a strategic partnership aimed at inspiring future generations of Explorers and solution-seekers. EPAM will serve as the Society's preferred digital transformation partner, modernizing its infrastructure with innovative technologies and creating AI-native interactive experiences, including those for the National Geographic Museum of Exploration. This collaboration seeks to scale the Society's scientific and educational endeavors, connect global audiences with nature through enhanced storytelling, and equip future leaders with digital tools for a sustainable future.

feed.title: Builders FirstSource, Inc. (BLDR): A Bull Case Theory
feed.summary: This article summarizes a bullish thesis on Builders FirstSource, Inc. (BLDR), highlighting its position as the largest building materials distributor in the U.S. The company's strategy includes focusing on higher-margin, value-added services, pursuing acquisitions, and aggressively returning capital to shareholders through buybacks. Despite substantial buyback activity, BLDR shares are noted to trade at an attractive free cash flow yield, with potential for further upside from continued industry consolidation.

feed.title: Brown & Brown Mourns the Passing of Chief Legal Officer Robert Mathis
feed.summary: Brown & Brown, Inc. announced with deep sorrow the passing of its Chief Legal Officer, Robert Mathis. Described as a dynamic leader, exceptional attorney, and true friend, Mathis's profound impact on the company and his colleagues is considered immeasurable. Eileen Akerson will serve as interim Chief Legal Officer during this time of loss for the company.

feed.title: Progressive’s Q4 combined ratio edges up to 88% as premiums rise 8%
feed.summary: Progressive Corp. reported a slight increase in its Q4 combined ratio to 88.0% from 87.9% a year prior, indicating a slight deterioration in underwriting performance. Despite this, the U.S. auto insurer saw its profits rise due to higher premiums and investment gains. This news was released on Wednesday.

feed.title: DuPont Introduces DuPont™ AmberLite™ FPA57 Resin to Boost Efficiency in Organic Acid Purification
feed.summary: DuPont has launched its new AmberLite™ FPA57 resin, designed to enhance the efficiency of organic acid purification crucial for various industries like food and beverage, personal care, and pharmaceuticals. This upgraded resin offers increased operating capacity, longer run lengths, and improved fouling resistance, helping manufacturers reduce chemical consumption, wastewater, and operational costs. It is compatible with existing systems, allowing for seamless upgrades to boost productivity and maintain high product quality.

feed.title: Oceania Cruises® Honors America's 250th Anniversary with Extraordinary Alaska and New England Voyages
feed.summary: Oceania Cruises is celebrating America's 250th anniversary by offering 19 special Alaska and New England voyages in 2026. These itineraries on the Oceania Riviera and Oceania Vista aim to immerse travelers in the nation's history, landscapes, and culture through culinary and destination-focused experiences. Featured voyages include explorations of Alaska's wilderness and New England's historic sites, with a focus on luxury and authentic connections.

feed.title: ServiceNow Reworks Partner Program, Expands AI Services and Partner Monetization
feed.summary: ServiceNow has revamped its partner program to enhance business opportunities and better serve customers through a more diverse range of AI products and services. The updated program introduces a new Access Tier for entry-stage partners, new funding initiatives like Market Development Fund and Strategic Investment Fund, and a simplified single annual membership fee. Analysts view these changes as a strategic move to simplify partner interactions, support growth, and leverage open marketplace models, especially in the AI agent space.

feed.title: New Motorola police AI cuts report writing from an hour to 15 minutes
feed.summary: Motorola Solutions has launched Assist Suites, a new portfolio of AI-powered tools designed for public safety agencies. These role-based AI solutions aim to streamline operations, enhance emergency response times, and reduce administrative burdens for dispatchers and field officers. The Narrative Assist tool, for example, can cut police report writing time from an hour to just 15 minutes, allowing officers to spend more time in the community.

feed.title: MetLife Recognized as Industry Leader on Fortune World’s Most Admired Companies™ 2026 List
feed.summary: MetLife has been recognized for the seventh consecutive year on the Fortune World’s Most Admired Companies™ list, ranking No. 1 in the Insurance: Life and Health industry for 2026. This acknowledgment highlights MetLife's strong reputation, consistent performance, and leadership in financial services. The company's commitment to customers, colleagues, and communities, coupled with its purpose-driven and inclusive culture, were key factors in this recognition.

feed.title: Decisions Recognized in Inaugural Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ and Critical Capabilities for Decision Intelligence Platforms Report
feed.summary: Decisions, a provider of business process automation and AI orchestration platforms, has been recognized as a Challenger in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Decision Intelligence Platforms (DIPs). The company was also a top-five vendor across all use cases in Gartner's Critical Capabilities report, excelling in Decision Governance. This recognition highlights Decisions' platform for its ability to integrate data, rules, and AI to support, automate, and augment decision-making.

feed.title: Breaking: IDX Halts Stock Trading After JCI Drops 8%
feed.summary: Indonesia's stock exchange (IDX) halted trading for 30 minutes after the Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) dropped over 8%, triggered by an automatic circuit breaker. This sharp decline followed an assessment by MSCI Inc. regarding the free-float levels of Indonesian listed companies, causing negative investor sentiment and broad selling pressure. The IDX has reaffirmed its commitment to strengthening market transparency and data quality to maintain credibility among global investors and increase Indonesia's weight in the MSCI index.

feed.title: Insurer Progressive Corp post strong profit from premium growth By Investing.com
feed.summary: Progressive Corp reported strong December-quarter results, driven by improved underwriting performance and robust premium growth, especially in its auto insurance segment. The insurer posted a net income of $2.95 billion and earnings per share of $5.02, with net premiums written increasing to $19.51 billion. The company's combined ratio improved to 88%, indicating profitability, and also announced a planned leadership transition in its finance team.

feed.title: PepsiCo, Inc. $PEP Shares Sold by Truist Financial Corp
feed.summary: Truist Financial Corp reduced its holdings in PepsiCo, Inc. by 1.1% in the third quarter, selling 11,987 shares and retaining over 1.1 million shares valued at $155.28 million. Despite this, other institutional investors increased their stakes in PepsiCo, and the company recently declared a quarterly dividend of $1.4225 per share. Wall Street analysts have issued mixed ratings, with a consensus "Hold" and an average price target of $159.29.

feed.title: J&J sharpens Darzalex's edge with quadruplet FDA nod in newly diagnosed multiple myeloma
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson's Darzalex Faspro has received its 12th FDA indication, a new nod for a quadruplet combination (D-VRd) in newly diagnosed multiple myeloma patients ineligible for autologous stem cell transplant. This approval makes D-VRd the only anti-CD38 antibody-based regimen for newly diagnosed patients regardless of transplant eligibility, further solidifying Darzalex's role as a foundational therapy. The approval was supported by the Cepheus trial, which demonstrated a significantly higher MRD-negativity rate and a 40% reduction in disease progression or death risk with the quadruplet regimen.

feed.title: Intel Baby Bucks: Hi-tech company promises to match Trump savings accounts
feed.summary: Intel has announced that it will match the U.S. Government's $1000 contribution to 530A "Trump Accounts" for eligible children of U.S. employees born between 2025 and 2028. This initiative aims to provide an early financial foundation for future technologists, reinforcing Intel's commitment to its employees' families. The announcement comes despite recent layoffs by the company, which has been a major employer in Washington County.

feed.title: Lennox International shares slide after Q4 earnings and revenue miss (LII:NYSE)
feed.summary: Lennox International (LII) shares dropped 4.6% in premarket trading after the company missed Wall Street's fourth-quarter earnings and revenue estimates. The miss was attributed to weak sales volumes, an accounting method change, softer demand in the home comfort segment, and channel destocking. Despite the Q4 miss, management projects a 6-7% rise in full-year revenue and adjusted earnings of $23.50 to $25.00 per share.

feed.title: Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY) Exec Joins Pacira BioSciences Board
feed.summary: Pacira BioSciences (PCRX) has appointed Dr. Samit Hirawat, a former Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY) executive, to its Board of Directors, enhancing its strategic leadership with his extensive pharmaceutical industry experience. Bristol Myers Squibb, a major player in drug manufacturing with a market capitalization of $113.1 billion, exhibits strong profitability but also potential financial stress indicators and sector-specific risks. The article highlights BMY's financial health, valuation, and market sentiment, suggesting careful consideration for investors.

feed.title: Starbucks: Fiscal Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Starbucks reported fiscal first-quarter net income of $293.3 million, or 26 cents per share, which adjusted to 56 cents per share. This fell short of analysts' expectations of 58 cents per share. However, the company's revenue of $9.92 billion surpassed Street forecasts, and Starbucks projects full-year earnings between $2.15 and $2.40 per share.

feed.title: Progressive: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Progressive Corp. (PGR) reported strong fourth-quarter results, with net income reaching $2.95 billion, or $5.02 per share, and adjusted earnings of $4.67 per share, surpassing analyst expectations. The insurer also exceeded revenue forecasts, posting $22.75 billion, or an adjusted $22.49 billion, for the quarter. For the full year, the company achieved a profit of $11.31 billion on $86.94 billion in revenue.

feed.title: Intuit Launches Career Pipeline Program for Future Accountants
feed.summary: Intuit has launched a new Career Pipeline Program to upskill one million students in the accounting industry over the next five years, focusing on digital, data, and advisory skills for an AI-transformed landscape. The program aims to address the significant number of Gen Z individuals lacking career advice in accounting by offering immersive learning, industry certifications, and a "Career Lab" virtual event. Intuit emphasizes that AI will amplify, not replace, accountants, and the initiative provides resources for young professionals to transition from academia to the workplace.

feed.title: Little House Capital LLC Sells 9,815 Shares of Merck & Co., Inc. $MRK
feed.summary: Little House Capital LLC reduced its stake in Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE:MRK) by 38.9%, selling 9,815 shares and retaining 15,421 shares valued at $1.29 million. Concurrently, Merck EVP David Michael Williams sold 8,614 shares, decreasing his position by 25.95%. Despite some analyst price target increases, the consensus rating for Merck remains "Hold" with an average price target of $114.53.

feed.title: Little House Capital LLC Acquires New Holdings in Cisco Systems, Inc. $CSCO
feed.summary: Little House Capital LLC has acquired a new stake of 17,258 shares in Cisco Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ:CSCO) during Q3, valued at approximately $1.18 million. Institutional investors now own 73.33% of the company, and analysts have set a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average target price of $86.81, despite recent insider selling including CEO Charles Robbins. The company recently beat quarterly EPS estimates and announced a quarterly dividend, while also launching a new AI-focused partner program.

feed.title: Novare Capital Management LLC Sells 1,749 Shares of Cummins Inc. $CMI
feed.summary: Novare Capital Management LLC reduced its stake in Cummins Inc. by 4.7%, selling 1,749 shares and now holding 35,430 shares valued at $14.97 million. This move comes as Cummins beat its quarterly earnings expectations with an EPS of $5.59 and generated $8.32 billion in revenue, despite a slight year-over-year decrease. The company's stock is trading near its 1-year high, and analysts have issued a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $522.07.

feed.title: Novare Capital Management LLC Cuts Holdings in Walmart Inc. $WMT
feed.summary: Novare Capital Management LLC slightly reduced its stake in Walmart Inc. by 2.9% in Q3, now holding 339,924 shares valued at $35.03 million. Despite this reduction and recent insider selling, Walmart reported strong Q3 earnings, beating revenue and EPS expectations, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $123.20. Institutional investors collectively own 26.76% of the company's stock.

feed.title: Rainey & Randall Wealth Advisors Inc. Has $5.67 Million Stock Position in McDonald's Corporation $MCD
feed.summary: Rainey & Randall Wealth Advisors Inc. significantly increased its stake in McDonald's Corporation (NYSE:MCD) by 57.8% in Q3, now holding 18,661 shares valued at $5.67 million. Despite this institutional accumulation, company insiders have been net sellers, divesting over 45,000 shares worth $13.84 million in the past three months. Wall Street analysts currently rate McDonald's as a "Hold" with a consensus price target of $328.88.

feed.title: Keurig Dr Pepper, Inc $KDP Holdings Reduced by Novare Capital Management LLC
feed.summary: Novare Capital Management LLC significantly reduced its holdings in Keurig Dr Pepper, Inc ($KDP) by 86.2% in Q3, selling over 124,000 shares. Despite this reduction, major institutional investors like Vanguard, State Street, Invesco, and Norges Bank increased their stakes, with institutional investors now owning 93.99% of the stock. Keurig Dr Pepper trades near $27.59, has a market cap of $37.48 billion, a P/E of 23.78, and offers a 3.3% dividend yield, with analysts giving it a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and a $34.87 price target.

feed.title: Violet Foods buys Muir Glen from General Mills
feed.summary: Violet Foods LLC, a newly launched canned tomato and sauce company, has acquired the Muir Glen organic tomato products brand from General Mills Inc. This acquisition strengthens Violet Foods' portfolio, which already includes Sclafani, Don Pepino, and Fattoria Fresca brands, positioning it as a key player in the over $5 billion US tomato sauce and canned tomato market. The purchase enables Violet Foods to combine Muir Glen's legacy in organic tomatoes with its expertise in fresh-pack products, aiming for accelerated innovation and growth.

feed.title: Major Bank’s In House Voting Plan Tests Broadridge Proxy Role
feed.summary: A major bank's decision to internalize proxy voting by building its own system, rather than relying on external advisers, raises questions for Broadridge Financial Solutions (NYSE:BR). While Broadridge's core infrastructure role in distributing ballots remains strong, this shift could influence demand for its event-driven proxy activities and potentially lead to new client needs for customized governance tools. Broadridge's long-term strategy of focusing on tech-driven infrastructure rather than pure advisory services might position it well to adapt to such changes.

feed.title: Intercontinental Exchange Launches Reddit Signals and Sentiment Tool Providing Actionable Market Indicators for Investors
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) has launched Reddit Signals and Sentiment, a new suite of data and analytical tools. These tools utilize AI and ICE’s data science expertise to transform millions of complex, unstructured Reddit conversations into actionable market signals for investors. The service helps investors identify alpha-generating opportunities and manage risk by providing real-time and historical sentiment scores and trend analysis.

feed.title: Inside the prefab ‘AI factories’ promising 35% faster data center buildouts
feed.summary: Eaton is collaborating with Flexnode to accelerate the deployment of modular "AI factories" for data centers, aiming for a 35% reduction in buildout time. Eaton will provide critical power backup, racks, and cable management for Flexnode's modules, addressing the increasing power demands of AI and high-performance computing workloads. This partnership expands Eaton's modular offerings and seeks to provide turnkey, prefabricated IT infrastructure for high-density data halls.

feed.title: Cellares Raises $257 Million Series D Led by BlackRock and Eclipse to Industrialize Global Cell Therapy Manufacturing with Breakthrough Automation
feed.summary: Cellares, an Integrated Development and Manufacturing Organization (IDMO), has successfully closed a $257 million Series D financing round co-led by BlackRock and Eclipse, increasing its total capital raised to $612 million. The funding will support the global expansion of automated IDMO Smart Factories in various locations, enabling commercial-scale manufacturing of cell therapies for hundreds of thousands of patients annually. Cellares aims to transform cell therapy manufacturing from manual processes to an automated, high-throughput model, addressing scalability challenges and reducing costs with its proprietary Cell Shuttle™ and Cell Q™ systems.

feed.title: FDA grants breakthrough therapy designation to Biogen’s litifilimab
feed.summary: The FDA has granted Breakthrough Therapy Designation to Biogen Inc.'s litifilimab for treating cutaneous lupus erythematosus (CLE), an autoimmune skin disease with no approved targeted treatments. This designation, based on positive Phase 2 study data, aims to accelerate the drug's development and review process. Biogen is currently conducting a Phase 3 study for litifilimab, with results expected in 2027, and analysts anticipate strong EPS for 2025.

feed.title: Amex Platinum Offers a Massive Welcome Offer. Find Out Your Offer Now
feed.summary: The American Express Platinum Card is currently offering एक of its most valuable welcome bonuses, potentially up to 175,000 Membership Rewards points after spending $8,000 in the first six months. This offer, valued at a minimum of $1,750 in travel rewards, is considered a significant opportunity for eligible applicants due to its high value and the card's extensive luxury travel perks, despite its steep $895 annual fee. The article highlights the card's benefits, such as over $3,500 in annual credits and access to over 1,550 airport lounges, making it attractive for travelers.

feed.title: Truist's $548B bank taps senior execs for UBS and BofA finance events
feed.summary: Truist Financial Corporation announced that two senior executives, Dontá Wilson and Mike Maguire, will speak at upcoming financial services conferences. Wilson will present at the UBS Financial Services Conference on February 10, 2026, and Maguire will speak at the BofA Securities Financial Services Conference on February 11, 2026. The company, which reported total assets of $548 billion as of December 31, 2025, will provide live audio webcasts and replays of these presentations on its investor relations website.

feed.title: Truist to speak at the UBS Financial Services Conference and BofA Securities Financial Services Conference
feed.summary: Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) announced that its Chief Consumer and Small Business Banking Officer, Dontá Wilson, will speak at the UBS Financial Services Conference on February 10, 2026. Additionally, Chief Financial Officer Mike Maguire will present at the BofA Securities Financial Services Conference on February 11, 2026. Webcasts for both events will be available on Truist's investor relations website, with replays accessible for 30 days.

feed.title: MSCI's (NYSE:MSCI) Q4 CY2025 Earnings Results: Revenue In Line With Expectations
feed.summary: MSCI (NYSE:MSCI) reported its Q4 CY2025 earnings, with revenue of $822.5 million matching Wall Street expectations and representing a 10.6% year-on-year increase. The company's non-GAAP profit of $4.66 per share exceeded analyst estimates by 1.6%. Despite meeting revenue expectations and beating EPS, shares traded down 3.5% immediately following the results.

feed.title: McKesson declares quarterly dividend of 82 cents per share
feed.summary: McKesson Corporation (NYSE:MCK) announced a regular quarterly dividend of 82 cents per share, payable on April 1, 2026, to shareholders of record on March 2, 2026. This dividend represents an annual yield of 0.39% and continues the company's 32-year streak of dividend payments with significant growth. InvestingPro data also indicates McKesson's strong financial health, undervaluation, and robust stock performance over the past year.

feed.title: Intuit offers free AI-era accounting training for 1M students
feed.summary: Intuit (NASDAQ: INTU) has launched its new Career Pipeline Program, aiming to upskill one million accounting students over the next five years. This initiative is designed to equip future accountants with digital, data, and advisory skills essential as AI transforms the accounting industry. The program will offer industry-recognized certifications and training in AI technologies, addressing a significant talent shortage and perception gap within the accounting profession.

feed.title: Paychex (NASDAQ:PAYX) Rating Increased to Strong Sell at Cantor Fitzgerald
feed.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald upgraded Paychex (NASDAQ:PAYX) to a "strong sell" rating, while other analysts maintain "hold" or "neutral" ratings with varying price targets. Despite the negative rating, Paychex announced a $1 billion share repurchase plan, indicating management believes the stock is undervalued. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings and revenue growth, surpassing analyst estimates.

feed.title: Moderna (NASDAQ:MRNA) Coverage Initiated at Barclays
feed.summary: Barclays has initiated coverage on Moderna (NASDAQ:MRNA) with an "equal weight" rating and a $25.00 price target, suggesting a significant downside from its current price. This rating aligns with a broader analyst consensus of "Reduce" for the stock, with 12 Holds and 5 Sells against 2 Buys. The report highlights weak fundamentals for Moderna, including negative EPS and revenue declines, and forecast an EPS of -9.61 for the current year.

feed.title: Phoenix Financial Ltd. Raises Holdings in Johnson Controls International plc $JCI
feed.summary: Phoenix Financial Ltd. increased its stake in Johnson Controls International plc (NYSE:JCI) by 49.5% during the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 37,918 shares valued at $4.17 million. This move is part of broader institutional investor activity, with other firms also adjusting their positions in JCI. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for JCI with a consensus target price of $126.11, following recent positive earnings results and a declared quarterly dividend of $0.40.
